response: The March onboarding cohort satisfaction dropped to 7.2/10 from 8.1/10, with positives including the buddy system (9.1/10) and on-time IT support, but key issues are delayed tools access (3–5 days vs. 1-day target), confusion about the benefits deadline, and not receiving a culture handbook. Action item: prioritize fixing tools access to meet the 1-day target.
